texto: Good composition is like a suspension bridge
autor: each line adds strength and takes none away... Making lines run into each other is not composition. There must be motive for the connection. Get the art of controlling the observer – that is composition.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a each line adds strength and takes none away... Making lines run into each other is not composition. There must be motive for the connection. Get the art of controlling the observer – that is composition.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Good composition is like a suspension bridge” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, robert-henri, composition pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
